comments.text: Cool. We want to add sidecars for the .go files in claude-collab shortly after this. I realize the Go server for claude-collab was quire straightforward, so it didn't exactly illustrate this point inherently.

comments.text: This is a particularly funny one, because at the end of the day, you became friends again with the wire! You noted that the wire IS the system language after all in your 3-languages essay. Let's try to reconcile these two things at the console.
